docs.title: GueInsight Documentation

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.hero_subtitle: Pricing for Free, Starter, Compliance Pro, Enterprise Professional, Enterprise Risk, and Enterprise Elite

pricing_page.hero_body: Compare plans from Free through Enterprise Elite. Start with basic analysis, then add GDPR export and deletion, NIS2 workflows, EU data residency, API access, and vCISO guidance as your needs grow.
pricing_page.starter_desc: For getting started with basic analysis and onboarding.
starter_features: Basic file types (TXT, JSON, XML, logs)
pricing_page.pro_desc: GDPR-focused threat detection with audit trails and compliance workflows.
pricing_page.risk_desc: NIS2 + ISO27001 risk management for critical infrastructure and enterprises.
pricing_page.elite_desc: White-glove SOC2 compliance, EU data residency, and dedicated support.

plan_selector.title: Select a plan — trial or subscribe immediately

footer.services_text: For services, assessments, or consultancy, visit

landing.utility: A GUECYBER Product • Enterprise Cybersecurity Platform
landing.eyebrow: GueInsight — Practical cybersecurity for business continuity and compliance
landing.title: Unified threat analysis, tenant & device audits, and compliance-ready reporting.
landing.lead: GueInsight is a product of Gue Cyber, built for security, IT and compliance teams who need rapid, decision-grade incident analysis and audit evidence. Upload files, connect Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, and produce traceable reports for GDPR, NIS2 and ISO-style audits without heavy tooling overhead.
landing.snapshot_files_desc: PDFs, PCAPs, logs, DBs, docx — automated IoC extraction, hashing and entropy.
landing.snapshot_compliance_desc: GDPR export/deletion requests, NIS2 incident summaries, and auditor-ready evidence packs.
landing.snapshot_cloud_desc: M365 & Google Workspace discovery for users, groups, device and policy audits.
landing.fast_analysis_desc: Upload logs, PDFs, PCAPs or databases — the platform extracts IoCs, computes file entropy and hashes, and highlights suspicious patterns quickly.
landing.compliance_ready_desc: Generate export & deletion requests, incident evidence packs, and NIS2-style incident summaries for auditors and stakeholders.
landing.tenant_discovery_desc: Connect Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace to enumerate users, groups, devices and policy gaps for GDPR and NIS2 risk reviews.
landing.ingest_files_desc: PDF, DOCX, TXT, PCAP, SQLite and log files — automated parsing, IoC extraction and sandboxing workflows.
landing.run_intelligence_desc: NER, classification and ML-assisted scoring combined with rule-based alerting and enrichment.
landing.manage_incidents_desc: Convert findings into events, apply playbooks, notify Slack/Teams and export evidence for auditors.
landing.auto_ioc_desc: IP, URL, email, hash extraction + enrichment
landing.alerting_desc: Slack/Teams notifications and custom alert rules
landing.compliance_tiers_desc: GDPR exports, NIS2 reporting and EU residency options
landing.trial_policy_desc: Trials are 14 days and must be started by selecting a paid plan and entering a payment method. We validate the payment method before the trial begins to prevent abuse. At the end of the 14-day trial the subscription will auto-bill the selected plan unless cancelled before trial expiry. A Free plan is available for individuals with limited quotas.
landing.audit_first_desc: Event logs, rule history and evidence exports are designed to support auditor workflows.
landing.access_control_desc: User roles and account-level controls limit access to sensitive data; GDPR tools support export and deletion requests.
landing.data_subject_desc: Compliance Pro+ tiers include tools to facilitate data subject requests and evidence retention controls.
landing.soc_teams_desc: Lightweight investigation layer to supplement SIEM/EDR
landing.compliance_teams_desc: GDPR and NIS2-ready reporting and workflows
landing.faq_card_1_q: Do I need to give a payment card to try it?
landing.faq_card_1_a: Yes — we require a payment method during trial sign-up. The card is validated but you will not be charged until the trial ends unless you keep the subscription.
landing.faq_card_2_q: Will you delete our data if requested?
landing.faq_card_2_a: Yes — Compliance Pro and above include GDPR export and deletion features to facilitate data-subject requests.
